questions.question: Explain the difference between Google App Engine's Standard Environment and Flexible Environment.
keyPoints: Standard Environment uses sandboxed runtimes with automatic scaling
Flexible Environment uses Docker containers allowing custom runtimes
Standard has free tier and faster deployment
Flexible allows SSH access and background processes
Standard has restrictions on writing to local filesystem

questions.question: Describe the architecture of a microservices-based application on Google App Engine and explain how different services communicate with each other.
keyPoints: Multiple services defined in separate app.yaml files with service identifiers
Services deployed independently and can have different runtimes
Communication via HTTP requests using service URLs
Asynchronous communication through Cloud Tasks or Pub/Sub
Shared datastore and memcache for data persistence
Independent scaling of each service based on workload
Centralized logging and monitoring across all services
